name: Israel Defense Forces
notes: Unified military of Israel; overall command of Israeli defensive and offensive operations

name: Israeli Air Force
notes: Primary operator of Arrow, David's Sling, and Iron Dome interception systems

name: Israeli Navy
notes: Operates Sa'ar-class corvettes with Barak-8 naval air defense

name: Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps
type: Military branch (parallel to regular armed forces)
notes: Controls Iran's ballistic missile program and drone operations; primary force conducting strikes in this conflict

name: IRGC Aerospace Force
notes: Operates all Iranian ballistic missiles and most attack drones; responsible for Operation True Promise strikes

name: IRGC Navy
notes: Operates fast attack craft, mines, and anti-ship missiles in Persian Gulf and Strait of Hormuz

name: Islamic Republic of Iran Army
notes: Iran's conventional military; distinct from IRGC. Air Defense Force operates radar networks and SAM systems

name: Islamic Republic of Iran Air Force
aliases: نیروی هوایی ارتش جمهوری اسلامی ایران
notes: Conventional air force; operates aging fleet of F-4, F-5, F-14, Su-24, MiG-29

name: Islamic Republic of Iran Air Defense Force
notes: Separated from IRIAF in 2008; operates Bavar-373, S-300PMU2, and other SAM systems

name: United States Navy
notes: Fifth Fleet (NAVCENT) headquartered in Bahrain; carrier strike groups in Persian Gulf / Arabian Sea

name: United States Air Force
notes: AFCENT operates from Al-Udeid (Qatar), Ali Al-Salem (Kuwait), and other Gulf bases

name: United States Central Command
notes: Unified combatant command responsible for Middle East theater; forward HQ at Al-Udeid, Qatar

name: Royal Air Force
notes: Participated in interception operations during Operation True Promise strikes; operates Typhoons from regional bases

name: Royal Navy
notes: Type 45 destroyers with Aster missile defense; HMS Diamond notably engaged Iranian drones in 2024

name: French Air and Space Force
aliases: Armée de l'Air et de l'Espace
notes: Participated in interception of Iranian drones during Operation True Promise; operates Rafale from regional bases

name: Royal Jordanian Air Force
notes: Intercepted Iranian drones and missiles transiting Jordanian airspace

name: Hezbollah
notes: Iranian-backed Lebanese militia; operates rockets, ATGMs, and drones against northern Israel

name: Ansar Allah (Houthis)
notes: Iranian-backed Yemeni group; operates ballistic missiles, cruise missiles, and drones against Israel and Red Sea shipping

name: Islamic Resistance in Iraq
notes: Umbrella term for Iranian-backed Iraqi Shia militia groups including Kata'ib Hezbollah, Harakat al-Nujaba, etc.

name: Royal Saudi Air Force
notes: Operates Patriot PAC-3 air defense; may have participated in intercept operations over Saudi airspace
